sn45.33:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, those who have neglected the Noble Eightfold Path have neglected the noble path[n.28] Though all three eds. have aṭṭhaṅgiko here, I suggest deleting it to bring the wording into conformity with SN46.18 and SN51.2. leading to the complete destruction of suffering. Those who have undertaken the Noble Eightfold Path have undertaken the noble path leading to the complete destruction of suffering. sn.v.24
sn45.33:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the Noble Eightfold Path? It is: right view … right concentration. Those who have neglected this Noble Eightfold Path … Those who have undertaken this Noble Eightfold Path have undertaken the noble path leading to the complete destruction of suffering."
